cards.title: Inline PR Comments
cards.summary: The reviewer posts structured inline comments directly on changed lines, with severity levels and actionable suggestions.

cards.title: Issue Ops Project View
cards.summary: GitHub Project view for issue applicability triage with suggested action, confidence, and linked PR context for stale infra blockers.

cards.title: CLI Setup Wizard
cards.summary: Interactive wizard guides you through authentication, repo selection, and workflow generation in under a minute.

cards.title: Desktop Chat App
cards.summary: IX Chat lives in your system tray, providing instant access to AI conversations with tool calling support.

cards.title: Email Tool Pack
cards.summary: AI assistants can compose, search, and manage emails through the Email tool pack with Exchange and Graph API support.

cards.title: Web Setup UI
cards.summary: Local web interface for configuring reviewers, managing authentication, and monitoring usage across repositories.

cards.title: Usage Reporting
cards.summary: Generate polished usage bundles from Codex, Claude, LM Studio, Copilot CLI, and GitHub, with automatic coverage for current profiles, Windows.old restores, and WSL homes.

cards.title: Active Directory Tools
cards.summary: Query and manage Active Directory users, groups, and computers through AI-powered natural language commands.
